data.body: Epic completion-verifier caught 2 more real gaps: (1) missing cross-keyspace isolation test (local session artifact must not seed a change reader) — added to de8a; (2) 'Gerrit review memory keyed on change' not live end-to-end — WIRED change_id through review_bot/adapter.py + voter.py (both call sites) + test, updated ADR 0037 (no longer a follow-on). EPIC 374d now CLOSED (completion-verifier PASS). All 5 children + epic closed. Rebuilt stack (rebuild4): c3e4/c639/3bff unchanged, e51b 85801c2bb + de8a 1109de023 rebuilt. Re-pushing 477/478 for final votes, then submit.
